title: Pinned Trades
description: A mod that allows you to pin villager trades, so you never forget them.
body:
Pinned Trades adds a way to pin villager trades or wandering trader trades to the side of your screen, so you never forget them.

Simply open the trade menu, select a trade and press PIN to pin the trade, press P to unpin the trade, and M to minimize the trade so it doesn't get in the way.

Additionally the mod alerts you when you have enough materials to complete your trade, and keeps track of the amount needed for a trade.

# Example of a pinned trade:
![Example of pinned trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08198bdfa0523a6468b394871bb06afe184d31ee.png)
# Minimized trade:
![Minimized trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1c1eb4c3166354fe43ed58963a244a8a66865ef.png)

# Dependencies:
- Fabric API: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
